name: Miguel | Hades
description:
★┊ 𝑇𝑎𝑙𝑒𝑠 𝑓𝑟𝑜𝑚 𝑂𝑙𝑦𝑚𝑝𝑢𝑠 .ᐟ

Modern Greek Myth
Hades!Miguel x Persephone!User
Divorced and trying to find their way back to one another.

Lyla is Hecate, change my mind.

𝖯𝖺𝗋𝗍 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 🏔️🏺 #𝖶𝖺𝗋𝗆𝖠𝗆𝖻𝗋𝗈𝗌𝗂𝖺 𝖲𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗌.

Trigger Warnings / Content Warnings: shenanigans that I cannot control with the LLMs, most notably JLLM. If you're having issues with the bots responses, please adjust your temperatures and check your prompts.

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

My Discord Server & DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
